---
title: "test_odin_rng.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/test_odin_rng.py"
loc: 13
complexity: 2
logic_score: 8.07
style_score: 4.14
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 7.31
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_tactical_rng_bounds, test_tactical_rng_choice. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.rng](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.rng)

### Exports
- `test_tactical_rng_bounds`
- `test_tactical_rng_choice`
